abilities.name: 아로마베일
abilities.description: 같은 편으로 향하는 멘탈 공격을 막는다.

flavorTexts.text: It searches for food all day. It possesses a keen sense of smell but doesn’t use it for anything other than foraging.
This Pokémon spurns all but the finest of foods. Its body gives off an herblike scent that bug Pokémon detest.
